summary: Iteration 7 testing complete: All 4 corrections verified - (1) Active team takt duration bug fixed, (2) 'Takt suivant' button in overtime working, (3) Sound alerts at global level, (4) Break trigger_mode field implemented. Fixed one bug: Missing Square import in TVDisplay.js causing runtime error.

ui_bugs.issue: Missing Square icon import causing 'Square is not defined' runtime error

passed_tests: Backend: API root endpoint working
Backend: Server time returns Paris timezone
Backend: GET /api/lines returns estimated_takts correctly
Backend: TRADY 4 active team (Equipe en 2*8) has 25 min/takt, estimated_takts=33
Backend: XDD team has 30 min/takt, estimated_takts=15
Backend: Break trigger_mode field saved and retrieved correctly (immediate/end_of_takt)
Backend: sound_alerts stored at line level (not team level)
Backend: auto_resume_after_takt field controls next takt button behavior
Backend: POST /api/lines/{id}/next endpoint works correctly
Frontend Dashboard: TRADY 4 shows '25 min/takt' from active team
Frontend Dashboard: XDD shows '30 min/takt'
Frontend Dashboard: Estimated takts displayed correctly (Takt X/Y)
Frontend Dashboard: 'Takt suivant' button appears when overtime AND auto-next disabled
Frontend Dashboard: 'Takt suivant' button click advances to next takt
Frontend Config: 'Alertes sonores' section at global level (not in team dialog)
Frontend Config: 'Options globales' section with auto-start, auto-resume settings
Frontend Config: 'Déclenchement' field for each break with 'Immédiat' and 'Fin du takt en cours' options
Frontend TV Display: 'Takt suivant' button visible in overtime (after fix)
Frontend TV Display: Negative remaining time displayed in overtime
Frontend TV Display: Progress bar turns red in overtime
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted TEST_NoAutoNext_Line for testing 'Takt suivant' button in overtime
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 iteration 7 corrections verified: (1) Active team takt duration displayed correctly in Dashboard (TRADY 4 shows 25 min/takt, XDD shows 30 min/takt), (2) 'Takt suivant' button appears in Dashboard and TV Display when overtime AND auto_resume_after_takt=false, (3) Sound alerts ('Alertes sonores') section is at global line level not in team dialog, (4) Each break has 'Déclenchement' field with options 'Immédiat (à l'heure prévue)' and 'Fin du takt en cours'. Fixed missing Square import in TVDisplay.js.

bug_fix_applied.fix: Added 'Square' to the import statement from lucide-react
bug_fix_applied.impact: TVDisplay page was completely broken showing 'Square is not defined' error
